caption: Normal hemoglobin molecules
description: A cluster of several hemoglobin protein structures shown in a molecular model style.

caption: Disk-shaped red blood cell
description: Microscopic view of a healthy, biconcave disk-shaped red blood cell.

caption: Clumping sickle cell hemoglobin
description: Molecular model showing sickle cell hemoglobin proteins aggregating into a long, rigid rod structure.

caption: Sickle-shaped red blood cell
description: Microscopic view of a distorted, crescent-shaped (sickle) red blood cell.
